comments: Can collect fuel from outpost but prefer not toCycle from the middle, feed to the human playerNo preference for bump or trench, tend to feed to alliance zone during inactive periods Auton- 2 shooting cycles from the trench, have a center auto, starting at the hub, and shooting balls from the depot
